name: KrillApp.Trigger.SilentAlarmMs
title: Silent Alarm
description: Monitors for lack of data updates by starting a background delay timer. If no new execution occurs within the configured delay (in milliseconds), the node enters WARN state and executes all child nodes. Each new trigger resets the timer. Use this to detect disconnected sensors, failed devices, or stale data.
shortDescription: Triggers an alarm when no data updates are received within a configured time period.
llmPurpose: Detects absence of data updates by running a delay timer and triggering an alarm if the timer expires without being reset.
llmBehavior: starts background delay timer on execution
resets timer on each new execution
sets node state to PAUSED while waiting
sets node state to WARN if timer expires
executes child nodes when timer expires
llmInputs: execution events that reset the timer
llmPromptHints: alert if no data for 5 minutes
llmCreationHints: Create a SilentAlarm when the user wants to detect absence of data or communication failures. Requires a delay value in milliseconds.

llmConnectionHints.role: watchdog trigger that fires when upstream data stops arriving

llmExamples: Alert me if this sensor stops reporting for 5 minutes.
Set up a watchdog that fires if no data arrives in 60 seconds.
Notify me when this device goes offline.
